design_plan: rng(seed=42)->hero_flow=cinematic_centered; AIDA: attention(hero video), interest(fair Grok overview), desire(cache advantage), action(CTA). Hero math: max-width 1120px => 2–3 lines. Bento density verified via grid-auto-flow:dense. Label sweep: all competitors mentioned (Folk, Orchids, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok). Button contrast checked (ink/white).
headline: Super vs Grok — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Grok. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Grok

summary: A fair comparison of Super and Grok for people choosing a personal AI agent. Grok excels at real‑time information, multi‑agent debate, and media generation. Super is purpose‑built for durable computer‑use workflows, with agents that actually operate a computer and reuse a computer-use cache so repeated work gets cheaper over time.
